document.name: South Shore YMCA — Traditional Summer Camp (2026)
document.shortDescription: YMCA licensed day camp on Staten Island’s South Shore: 2026 Traditional Summer Camp (ages 6–12) with swim, arts, science, sports, and themed activities in two-week sessions June 29–August 21.
document.longDescription:
The YMCA of Greater New York’s South Shore branch publishes 2026 Summer Day Camp registration for programs running June 29 through August 21 in two-week sessions, with camp noted as closed Friday, July 3 in observance of the Independence Day holiday. Published camp hours are 9 a.m.–5 p.m. with extended hours listed as 7:30–9 a.m.

Traditional Summer Camp (ages 6–12) is described as including physical fitness, arts and crafts, science activities, theme days, group play, team building, and instructional swim, framed around YMCA core values (respect, caring, honesty, responsibility). Published pricing lists $856 per two-week session for Y Members and $942 per two-week session for Community participants.

The branch “Find us” line on the camp page lists 3939 Richmond Avenue, Staten Island, NY 10312. Camp leadership contact on the same page: southshoreycamp@ymcanyc.org and 718-227-3200.

The listing image is the official YMCA 2026 camp carousel photograph used on this camp page (STEM-themed hero), downloaded from YMCA-hosted media and re-uploaded to ImgBB for ClassScout storage policy compliance.

Sources: https://ymcanyc.org/locations/south-shore-ymca/programs-classes/camps https://ymcanyc.org/sites/default/files/styles/hero_banner_desktop/public/2025-12/2026_camp_stem.jpg.webp?itok=rXALosoc
document.announcementDescription: Official page links to register.ymcanyc.org summer-camp/13 and lists early-bird and sibling discount rules.
